name: remotion-video-toolkit
tagline: ClawHub (79★): Complete toolkit for programmatic video creation with Remotion + React. Covers animations, timing, rendering (CLI/Node.js/La
verdict: Depends on multiple failure-prone external pieces - AWS/GCP accounts, FFmpeg rendering, Node/React version requirements - but never says what to do when any of them fails. Broad multi-domain surface (animation, 3D, charts, serverless rendering) with no scope-exclusion language, and no version tracking either.

highlights.summary: Multiple failure-prone external dependencies (AWS/GCP account setup, FFmpeg rendering, Node/React version requirements) are named but no failure/fallback/stop-and-report guidance a
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language appears anywhere in the description or body, despite the skill's broad multi-domain surface (animation, 3D, charts, serverless rend
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
